extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the taillight of their car is cracked.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows the front of a blue car with significant damage to the front bumper, hood, and a broken headlight.

result.user_claim: Customer: The back light of my car cracked. | Agent: By back light, do you mean taillight? | Customer: Yes, taillight. | Agent: Is this about the front headlight? | Customer: No, taillight only.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: No image shows the claimed taillight; the claimed part cannot be assessed.
result.claim_status_justification: Image evidence is insufficient to evaluate the claim. No image shows the claimed taillight; the claimed part cannot be assessed.
